Off Calendar Dec-21-2017 Text Ruling

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Rochester Concrete Products, Llc is Granted. No opposition filed and the settlement meets the requirements of the Health and Safety Code.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details) Counsel for Ecological Rights Foundation to submit a proposed consent judgment which includes Pavestone LLC and Rochester Concrete Products.

Off Calendar Oct-24-2017 Continued To Jan-30-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Pavestone, Llc
Off Calendar Oct-23-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Frederic Evenson, Esq. (831-454-8216) of Ecology Law Center for Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation through Court Call.
Amanda Semaan, Esq. (310-500-2090) of Faegre Baker Daniel LLP for Defendant Rochester Concrete through Court Call.
Andrew Thompson, Esq. (404-815-3701) of Smith Gambrell & Russell LLP for Defnednat Pazestone through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court calls 554269 and 555429 (Lines 5 and 6) simultaneously. The Court inquires re: 16 day notice. Plaintiff to re-notice. The Court will hear the matter on December 1, 2017.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Pavestone, Llc

Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement as to defendant Pavestone, LLC is denied without prejudice to being refiled. There was insufficient service per CCP 1005.

Plaintiff's Counsel to re-notice motions. The Court will hear the 2 cases on December 1, 2017 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. (as fully reported on the reporter's transcript)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098, email:casey.giselle@gmail.com, Reported. (D302)

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court calls 554269 and 555429 (Lines 5 and 6) simultaneously. The Court inquires re: 16 day notice. Plaintiff to re-notice. The Court will hear the matter on December 1, 2017.

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's MOTION To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Rochester Concrete Products, Llc.

Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement as to defendant Rochester Concrete Products, LLC is denied without prejudice to being refiled. There was insufficient service per CCP 1005.

Plaintiff's Counsel to re-notice motions. The Court will hear the 2 cases on December 1, 2017 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. (as fully reported on the reporter's transcript)
